top-section.title: Professional Education, Bright Future
top-section.subtitle: Transform your career with cutting-edge courses designed by industry experts. Learn at your own pace and achieve your dreams.

about.title: Master School – 10 Years of Experience, Hundreds of Success Stories!
about.description: For 10 years, Master School Education Center has been the destination for quality, professionalism, and success in education...
about.proud: We are proud of our achievements:
about.proudItem1: In the last 6 years, we have had 11 National Champions in Master's degree preparation for both Azerbaijani and Russian sectors.
about.proudItem2: We have also achieved dozens of first-place rankings in Civil Service and Doctorate entrance exams.
about.endText: Master School – where knowledge, hard work, and success meet.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Providing the best educational services to our students

items.title: University Preparation
items.description: Classes are held twice a week, 1.5 hours per session. The first lesson is a free trial.

items.title: Master's Degree
items.description: Preparation is provided for 3 subjects: Logic, Informatics, and Foreign Language. Each subject is taught twice a week for 90 minutes. Rewarded MOCK EXAMS are held for students on weekends. Students with high scores in the Master's entrance exam receive cash prizes...

items.title: Civil Service
items.description: Held twice a week, 90 minutes per session. Trial exams are organized every weekend.

items.title: IELTS
items.description: Classes are held twice a week, 1.5 hours per session. The first lesson is a free trial. In addition to class hours, we offer Speaking Clubs twice a week, lasting from 1.5 to 3 hours. Monthly progress exams are conducted at the end of each month.

items.title: Pre-school
items.description: Classes are held twice a week, 1.5 hours per session. The first lesson is a free trial.

items.title: Teaching Certification (MIQ)
items.description: Classes are held twice a week, 1.5 hours per session. The first lesson is a free trial.
